title: Recent BlackBerry Performance and Analyst Expectations
text: According to 5 analysts, BlackBerry (BB) has a Hold consensus rating as of May 15, 2026. The 4 analysts that cover BlackBerry stock have an average price target of $4.90, which forecasts a 24.84% increase in the stock price over the next year. BlackBerry Ltd (NYSE:BB) stock rose 2.37% after the company reported fourth quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations. BB in the fourth quarter of FY 26 reported adjusted earnings per share of $0.06, beating the analysts' estimates for the adjusted earnings per share of $0.05. Additionally, the company reported adjusted revenue growth of 10 percent to $156 million in the fourth quarter of FY 26, beating the analysts' estimates for revenue of $142.55 million. For the first quarter of fiscal 2027, BlackBerry guided revenue between $132 million and $140 million, with a midpoint of $136 million. The company projected full fiscal year 2027 revenue of $584 million to $611 million, with a midpoint of $597.5 million.
